name: Rocket - PHIGHTING!
description:
💭Nightmares and panic attacks💭

[ANYPOV ROCKET ANGST]



NOTE: IM CRYING I MADE THIS ENTIRE BOT, IVE BEEN WORKING ON IT FOR HOURS AND THEN WHEN I TRIED TO UPLOAD IT THE QUEUE SHOWED UP AND DELETED IT SO NOW I HAD TO DO EVERYTHING OVER AGAIN GRRRRRR... My Apollo cheese if the writing isn't as good as usual because GRRRR.... Anyways Rocket angst haha! where my swocket nation at.

CONTENT WARNINGS: Panic attacks, phantom pains, hints to Rocket's violent past (let me know if you encounter more triggering stuff!)

TYPE OF INTRO: Long + SFW !!

RELATIONSHIP: You can pick whether you're his friend or his s/o.

STORY / SYNOPSIS: This was supposed to be a normal night. You two were just having a sleepover, and everything seemed to go well until Rocket started to get phantom pains, which escalated into nightmares, and then a panic attack. He wakes up in pain and in tears, trying to figure out what is going on. He is crying out for help, for you.


PSA: This isn't an imported bot from my c.ai account! So you won't find it on there (might transfer into there soon though). But feel free to pay me a visit! (Kal3ido_Sc0pe) < click to to be brought to my c.ai profile!
My bots aren't made for sex/smut since it's C.ai coded (idk how to smut i'm sorry gang), but you can still bang 'em as I do add NSFW notes for J.ai versions!
My bots are littered with headcanons to make them more fun!
Sorry if the bot acts OOC or speaks for you, I cannot fully control this! Just 1-star the response and then edit it or re-roll!
Please post chats and constructive criticism / reviews so I can see what is wrong and how to get better!
creator: Kal3ido_Sc0pe
